title: Russian peasant multiplication = a*b (doubling/halving/add only)
statement_informal: Russian peasant (Egyptian) multiplication computes a*b using only doubling, halving and addition — no multiplication primitive: peasant a b = (a mod 2)*b + peasant (a/2) (2*b). Correctness: peasant fuel a b = a*b for a <= fuel.

cost_model.notes: Halve a, double b, add b on odd a; ~lg a additions. Correctness via a = 2*(a/2)+a mod 2 (Nat.div_mod_eq) and nia.

references: Ancient Egyptian / Russian peasant multiplication — multiply via repeated doubling and halving, no multiplication table.
